notes: the  launcher at the start was all in black as others have stated. You simply hover the mouse cursor to find the launch button. Besides that the game ran perfectly out of the box. No tweaks necessary.
title: Strange Brigade

notes:
The starting window has black text on black backround, but you can start the game when you find the second link from below.
If you enable tesselation, then you will have graphical errors that make it unplayable. All other features seem to work.
title: Strange Brigade

notes:
Launcher is black, so I just renamed StrangeBrigade_Vulkan.exe to StrangeBrigade.exe in bin folder. After that a game runs without problems (I hadn't to use any other warkarounds). I played few hours in co-op and all worked really great. I didn't notice any issues. Performance was great on ultra settings.

BTW. I used AMDVLK v2019.Q2.1 instead on RADV, because on RADV tesselation is broken and performance much lower.
title: Strange Brigade

notes:
For correctly working tessellation should use mesa 19.0.4 and above.
https://cgit.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/commit/?id=b155f74d7bfc9daec7794074c4f644025fbddf8b
title: Strange Brigade

notes: You have to find your way  through a black launcher window, but the game itself runs great.
title: Strange Brigade

notes: Out of the box on Proton the launcher is only black. When copying the StrangeBrigade_Vulkan.exe to StrangeBrigade.exe, the game worked extremly well on Proton with native Vulkan!
title: Strange Brigade

notes: Had to replace StrangeBrigade.exe with StrangeBrigade_Vulkan.exe to skip the entirely black launcher, afterwards everything worked perfectly. (No sound problems, great performance.)
title: Strange Brigade

notes: The Vulkan exe starts, the screen flashes black, then it exits. Have tried command line options. Have tried the normal launcher (which appears black) and clicking the area under the title. Have tried renaming the Vulkan exe over the normal one.
title: Strange Brigade

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Tried all the aforementioned tweaks. (copying vulkan exe, etc.) Just a black screen, and then the application stops responding. Ran `vulkaninfo` and it might be due to missing 32 bit binaries. Not sure of a fix for that.
title: Strange Brigade

notes: The mandatory tweak to get this working as has been mentioned many times is to rename StrangeBrigade_Vulkan.exe to StrangeBrigade.exe to replace the launcher. After you do this the game will start up and play as expected with Vulkan. The game is nearly Gold but there are some strange rendering issues that can be seen in some areas, for examples the leaves of the trees in the menu. Otherwise the performance is great and it is entirely playable.
title: Strange Brigade
